explainability.findings: Documentation highlights the need for model traceability to support explainability.
explainability.path_to_improvement: Publish user-facing explanation interfaces or documented appeal workflows.

relevant_sources.summary: This presentation, "Artificial Intelligence Success stories - CIONET," provides evidence for **explainability, governance, and transparency**. The source highlights the need for model traceability and conscious decisions on control and responsible use of AI, directly supporting explainability and governance. Furthermore, it mentions AI capabilities and a track record of use cases, implying a structured approach to AI deployment and a focus on transparency.
relevant_sources.title: Artificial Intelligence Success stories - CIONET

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: Documentation highlights a governance effort focused on codifying data for AI. It also references the need for conscious decisions regarding the control and responsible use of AI.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **governance**, **oversight**, and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It highlights the governance effort in codifying data for AI and the transparency challenges in teaching AI about products and consumers. The press release also discusses future plans for AI platform expansion and personalization, indicating transparency goals, and mentions AI platform testing and its capabilities, demonstrating operational use and transparency. Furthermore, it considers using AI for employee training, suggesting potential oversight and transparency benefits for learning product details.
relevant_sources.title: Artificial Intelligence Powers Product Recommendations For The North Face

oversight.findings: Documentation considers using AI for employee training, suggesting potential oversight benefits for learning product details.
oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: Documentation highlights transparency challenges related to teaching AI about products and consumers. It also discusses future plans for AI platform expansion and personalization, referencing transparency goals. transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

summary.overall_findings: VF's published materials highlight transparency challenges in teaching AI about products and consumers. These disclosures also document a governance effort in codifying data for AI and the need for model traceability for explainability, covering 3 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars. This assessment draws on a review of 15 publicly available sources. No qualifying public evidence was found for fairness, oversight, and 2 additional pillars.
